description: Open the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' in ProjectLibre. Add a hyperlink to the 'System Architecture Design' task (ID 2) with the title 'Design Spec v2' and address 'https://internal.corp/specs/sys_arch_v2.pdf'. Add another hyperlink to the 'Security Audit' task (ID 11) with the title 'EPA Permit' and address 'file:///home/ga/Documents/permits/epa_compliance_2025.pdf'. Export the project as an MSPDI XML file to '/home/ga/Projects/linked_project.xml'.
